creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I'm afraid I missed this one, since all of my test machines already have devel/avr-libc on them. Pulling in avr-binutils and avr-gcc is OK, but this isn't a useful setup on new systems without the accompanying avr-libc. =) bumping PORTREVISION for this one.

Portlint still happy, Poudriere still happy.
